'''lazhufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanamid|cyanamid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanamid|cyanamid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazhufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzhifith|læzhifith]] || [[word:læzhifij|læzhifij]] || [[word:læzhifish|læzhifish]] || [[word:læzhifi|læzhifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazhuzhufuth|lazhuzhufuth]] || [[word:lazhuzhufuj|lazhuzhufuj]] || [[word:lazhuzhufush|lazhuzhufush]] || [[word:lazhuzhufu|lazhuzhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazhufuth|lazhufuth]] || [[word:lazhufuj|lazhufuj]] || [[word:lazhufush|lazhufush]] || [[word:lazhufu|lazhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazhuffufth|lazhuffufth]] || [[word:lazhuffufj|lazhuffufj]] || [[word:lazhuffufsh|lazhuffufsh]] || [[word:lazhuffuf|lazhuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazhufuthu|lazhufuthu]] || [[word:lazhufuju|lazhufuju]] || [[word:lazhufushu|lazhufushu]] || [[word:lazhufuku|lazhufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazhufuth|lazhufuth]] || [[word:lazhufuj|lazhufuj]] || [[word:lazhufush|lazhufush]] || [[word:lazhufu|lazhufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazhufuthul|lazhufuthul]] || [[word:lazhufujul|lazhufujul]] || [[word:lazhufushul|lazhufushul]] || [[word:lazhufukul|lazhufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazhufuuthuthu|lazhufuuthuthu]] || [[word:lazhufuujuju|lazhufuujuju]] || [[word:lazhufuushushu|lazhufuushushu]] || [[word:lazhufuuku|lazhufuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazhufuthun|lazhufuthun]] || [[word:lazhufujun|lazhufujun]] || [[word:lazhufushun|lazhufushun]] || [[word:lazhufukun|lazhufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazhufuthuoro|lazhufuthuoro]] || [[word:lazhufujuoro|lazhufujuoro]] || [[word:lazhufushuoro|lazhufushuoro]] || [[word:lazhufukuoro|lazhufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]

{{wordpage|307a66b}}
